Severino: 4.54 ERA, 4.07 FIP, 6.88 K/9, 2.77 BB/9 (RELIABLE). Recent ERA 5.50 over 3 starts. FIP gap 1.31 favors Eovaldi but recent form contradicts season stats severely.

picks.avoid_reason: Rangers ML at -115 violates multiple rules: Rangers away OPS .748 is 285 points below season (road liability), Eovaldi away ERA 11.42 and recent ERA 8.24 both severely elevated despite strong season numbers (SMALL_SAMPLE flag unreliable), and Rangers are back-to-back road underdog scenario. Athletics ML at +104 has no structural edge despite home OPS advantage - Severino recent ERA 5.50 and season ERA 4.54 are both mediocre. Total 9.0 has conflicting signals: both offenses elite by OPS but Rangers road split is .748 (weak), neutral park, both teams back-to-back. OVER requires park 1.10+ or temp 65F+ with wind OUT - neither present. UNDER requires SP gap 2.0+ confirmed - FIP gap only 1.31 and Eovaldi recent form is terrible. No clean edge exists.
picks.flags: Both teams back-to-back, Eovaldi away ERA 11.42 vs season 1.73 (extreme variance), Rangers away OPS .748 vs season 1.033 (road collapse)
